metadata.direction: Word ID → list of sentence IDs from editor-curated examples. IDs use the 'tatoeba-{n}' format.

field_notes.sentence_ids: All sentence IDs use a '{source}-{n}' convention. For Tatoeba, strip 'tatoeba-' to get the Tatoeba ID for lookup at https://tatoeba.org/en/sentences/show/{n}.

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/core/words.json, data/corpus/sentences.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
